name: cloud-architecture seed: all twelve seed source ids are present in the domain catalog
command: for id in aws-well-architected aws-architecture-center aws-prescriptive-security azure-well-architected azure-architecture-center azure-cloud-design-patterns gcp-architecture-framework gcp-architecture-center terraform-docs dod-scca nist-zero-trust cncf-cloud-native; do grep -E "^- id: $id$" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-architecture-sources.yaml" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL missing $id" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
